creator: mita@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
I contribute a new ports collection for dserver.
dserver is server & client programs which can read CDROM dictionary.
This port has been discussed at ports-jp@jp.FreeBSD.org.
The last problem for this ports collection was copyright of original tarball,
because dserver is developped by a lot of people.  This time, it is concluded
at dserver mailing list that it is OK to redistribute dserver tarball.

Fix: dserver ports is attached below. I wish it committed before source code freeze
for 2.2-RELEASE...(too late, perhaps??)
